name: Recommendation Letters
description: Drafts personalized college recommendation letters based on student context and achievements.

inputs.name: coursesWithStudent
inputs.description: Courses taken with this student and approximate dates.

inputs.name: strengths
inputs.description: Key academic and personal strengths to highlight.

inputs.name: anecdotes
inputs.description: Specific moments, projects, or interactions that illustrate the student.

inputs.name: targetSchools
inputs.description: Schools or programs the student is applying to, if known.

outputs.name: letter
outputs.description: Draft recommendation letter ready for review and personalization.
